segments.text: I will sing of your love and justice; to you, Lord, I will sing praise.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will be careful to lead a blameless life— when will you come to me? I will conduct the affairs of my house with a blameless heart.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not look with approval on anything that is vile. I hate what faithless people do; I will have no part in it.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The perverse of heart shall be far from me; I will have nothing to do with what is evil.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Whoever slanders their neighbor in secret, I will put to silence; whoever has haughty eyes and a proud heart, I will not tolerate.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My eyes will be on the faithful in the land, that they may dwell with me; the one whose walk is blameless will minister to me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: No one who practices deceit will dwell in my house; no one who speaks falsely will stand in my presence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Every morning I will put to silence all the wicked in the land; I will cut off every evildoer from the city of the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
